name: cloudflared-tunnel
description: SkyNet SSI component that wraps the native cloudflared binary to expose Cloudflare's global edge as a managed tunnel. Enhanced version with process crash detection, panic isolation, DoS protection, and graceful shutdown.

n.description: number of recent log lines to return

metadata.notes: This component does NOT re-compile cloudflared to WASM. It wraps the official cloudflared binary so the SkyNet runtime can manage tunnel instances through the standard SSI lifecycle interface. This enhanced version (v0.2.0) adds: (1) automatic process crash detection via watcher goroutine, (2) panic isolation in JSON-RPC handlers, (3) DoS protection via bounded semaphore (100 concurrent requests), (4) graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown with final state notification flush, (5) corrected config hash that includes IsFedramp and Headers fields.

v0.2.0: watchProcessExit goroutine: process crash auto-detected, state flips to ERROR within one heartbeat cycle
Panic isolation: handler panics do not kill the sidecar process
DoS protection: max 100 concurrent request goroutines via semaphore
Graceful shutdown: SIGINT/SIGTERM flushes final state_changed notification before exit
Corrected Forwarder.Hash() to include IsFedramp and Headers fields
Fixed mustInitRespMetaHeader panic -> error return pattern
Fixed namedTunnel nil-check ordering preventing goroutine leaks
